_meta.voice: Direct American English. Manufacturer / construction voice: factual, results-focused, no superlatives. Composite-pool industry terminology (factory, turnkey, installation).

strings.Mono Pools - сайт для виробника композит: Mono Pools — site for a composite-pool manufacturer in Ukraine
strings.Mono Pools - український виробник композ: Mono Pools is a Ukrainian composite-pool manufacturer with its own factory in Dnipro. We built a Next.js site with a conversion-driven structure, a model catalog, and SEO targeting commercial queries across Ukraine.
strings.SEO-структура допомогла вийти в Top-1 /: The SEO structure took the site to Top-1 / Top-2 on Google for target queries within about 2 months of launch
strings.Top-1 / Top-2 Google по цільових запитах: Top-1 / Top-2 Google for target queries · ~2 months from launch to search-ranking results · 6 sections: catalog, shipping, blog, projects, about, CTA · 0 paid plugins — custom code on Next.js
strings.Блог посилює органічне просування через: The blog reinforces organic growth through informational queries
strings.Блін ну кайф же з вами працювати, чому о: Working with you is a blast — why didn't I do this sooner
strings.Додали блог для збору інформаційного тра: Added a blog to capture informational traffic and warm the client toward a purchase
strings.Додали блоки довіри: переваги компанії,: Added trust blocks: company advantages, step-by-step process, completed projects, client reviews
strings.Дорогий продукт із довгим циклом прийнят: Expensive product with a long decision cycle
strings.Завдання: не просто презентувати компані: The task: not just present the company, but build a sales-and-SEO tool
strings.Запити типу «композитний басейн», «басей: Queries like "composite pool," "turnkey pool," "buy a pool price" have commercial intent — they need to be captured
strings.Зробили окремі сторінки під ключові розд: Built dedicated pages for the key sections: catalog, shipping, about, blog
strings.Зробили перший екран із чітким офером, ц: Built the first screen with a clear offer, trust numbers, and a CTA
strings.Каталог і посадкові сторінки збирають ко: The catalog and landing pages collect commercial traffic on specific queries
strings.Оформили каталог 13+ моделей із розмірам: Built the catalog of 13+ models with dimensions, prices, and action buttons — so the user can choose without picking up the phone
strings.Побудували структуру головної сторінки я: Built the homepage as a full sales funnel
strings.Покупцю важливо одразу бачити ціну, гара: Buyers need to see price, warranty, installation process, and completed-project examples up front
strings.Продумали SEO-структуру: мета-теги, H1–H: Designed the SEO structure: meta tags, H1–H3, SEO copy targeting commercial queries
strings.Розробили сайт на Next.js — без плагінів: Built the site on Next.js — no plugins, a clean technical base for SEO
strings.Розставили CTA на всіх рівнях сторінки —: Placed CTAs at every level of the page — inquire or jump to the catalog at any point
strings.Сайт працює як інструмент продажів: стру: The site works as a sales tool: structure, catalog, and content answer the buyer's questions on their own
strings.Сайт підтримує довіру через цифри, проєк: The site reinforces trust through numbers, projects, reviews, and a clear process
strings.Структура сторінки веде користувача від: The page structure leads the user from first contact with the product to inquiry
strings.У ніші є стабільний попит із Google, але: The niche has steady Google demand, but without an SEO structure the site doesn't capture that traffic
strings.Як ми переробили сайт виробника композит: How we rebuilt a composite-pool manufacturer's site. Top-1 / Top-2 Google for target queries · ~2 months from launch to search-ranking results · 6 sections: catalog, shipping, blog, projects, about, CTA · 0 paid plugins — custom code on Next.js
strings.платних плагінів — custom code на Next.j: paid plugins — custom code on Next.js
strings.розділів: каталог, доставка, блог, проєк: sections: catalog, shipping, blog, projects, about, CTA

sections[_key==\"sec6\"].bodyEn: A pool is an expensive purchase. The buyer takes their time — comparing options, looking up prices, reading about warranties, reviewing past projects. Without the right structure, a site can't sell in this niche.
sections[_key==\"sec9\"].bodyEn: We built the site from scratch on Next.js with a structure that walks the user from the first screen to an inquiry. Every block does one job — sales, trust, or SEO.
sections[_key==\"sech\"].bodyEn: The site became a full client-acquisition channel — not just a business card. The user gets answers to the key questions before the first call.
